name: frxedit-ai-skill
description: Skills and configuration to empower AI agents to build and edit MS-Forms (.frx) UserForms autonomously using the FrxEdit CLI.
author: Antigravity

skills.name: frxedit-builder
skills.description: A comprehensive guide on how to build and manipulate Visual Basic for Applications (VBA) UserForms entirely via JSON layout files using the FrxEdit compiler.
